meanings.definition: a person who joins with others in some activity or endeavor
examples: he had to consult his associate before continuing

meanings.definition: a friend who is frequently in the company of another
a person with subordinate membership in a society, institution, or commercial enterprise
examples: associates in the law firm bill at a lower rate than do partners

meanings.definition: any event that usually accompanies or is closely connected with another
examples: first was the lightning and then its thunderous associate

meanings.definition: a degree granted by a two-year college on successful completion of the undergraduates course of studies
make a logical or causal connection
examples: I cannot connect these two pieces of evidence in my mind
I cannot relate these events at all

meanings.definition: keep company with; hang out with
bring or come into association or action
examples: The churches consociated to fight their dissolution

meanings.definition: having partial rights and privileges or subordinate status
